nodes.context: One of the main Triad groups in Southern China, operating in Hong Kong, Macau, and abroad. Engages in extortion, loan sharking, narcotics, and control of nightclubs.
One of Hong Kong's most active triad groups, mentioned alongside Shui Fong.
Major triad group active in Hong Kong and Macau, rival of Shui Fong.
Triad group in the 'Wo' family, active in Hong Kong and UK, rival of Shui Fong.
One of the 'Four Major Gangs' in Macau alongside Shui Fong, 14K, and Big Circle Gang.
One of the 'Four Major Gangs' in Macau.

edges.context: Shui Fong and 14K have been perennial rivals, involved in gang wars in Macau and Hong Kong, including a 2010 clash resulting in a death.
Wo Shing Wo wanted a share of Shui Fong's video rental business in the UK, leading to the murder of Shui Fong adviser Philip Wong.
Shui Fong is one of Hong Kong's most active triads along with Sun Yee On, but no specific relationship is stated.
Shui Fong and Wo Shing Yee are two of the 'Four Major Gangs' in Macau, but no specific relationship is stated.
Shui Fong and Big Circle Gang are two of the 'Four Major Gangs' in Macau, but no specific relationship is stated.
